steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The question asks what choice “emphasizes how long Michael Edgson competed.” To show duration, you need both a start year and an end year.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice B states “from 1984 to 1992,” providing the full span of his competition. The other choices either list his medals, skip his competition years, or give only his debut year. That matches choice B — B is correct.
